text.title: Spec Advanced Guidelines Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Spec Advanced Guidelines.

example.scenario: A regulated payments feature: triggers fire for regulated + source-of-truth. NFR table lists p95 latency < 250ms, throughput ≥ 200 RPS, PII at rest encrypted (AES-256); AC rubric scores 9/10 average; glossary defines 8 terms; versioning records 2 revisions; content_id stable across the impl-plan and tests.
example.trace: r1-trigger-blocks-mandatory → r2-nfr-table-thresholds → r3-ac-rubric-applied → r5-versioning-record → r6-source-of-truth-pointer → artefact green
